_comment: Filter config for build_rap_dataset.py. Edit freely. A song is KEPT if its genre matches `genres_any` (substring, case-insensitive) OR its artist is in `artists_allow`. Anything in `artists_block` is always dropped. The artist list was SEEDED from the user's Spotify (melodic-trap neighborhood) and a curated default roster; refresh it any time — see README. NOTE: the 960K Spotify set may have NO genre column, in which case `artists_allow` is the primary filter, so keep it reasonably full.
